error_signature: workflow stops if Notion Search node finds no result
title: Workflow halts when Notion Search finds no entry
symptom: The workflow execution stops at the Notion Search node if no matching entry is found, preventing subsequent nodes from running.
applies_when: Expecting conditional logic based on search results
not_this_if: Not using conditional nodes after the Notion Search node
root_cause: The Notion Search node does not output any items when no results are found, which causes the workflow to halt. This behavior prevents any downstream nodes from executing, as they rely on the output of the previous node.
fix_steps: Configure the Notion Search node to always output an empty object, even when no results are found.
In the subsequent IF node, check if the output object is empty using the expression '{{ $json }} is empty'.
agent_instruction: Set the Notion Search node to always output an empty object and adjust the IF node to check for an empty output.
